features: FOR THE GENITAL AREA - Premium hair removal cream for the pubic region, groin, scrotum and buttocks.
THE ORIGINAL, MADE FOR MEN - Specifically developed to remove coarse male body hair.
QUICK AND EFFECTIVE - Lasts longer with less itchy regrowth and ingrown hair compared to shaving. Smooth skin, pain-free with NO RISK OF CUTS!
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED - Extra gentle with 24-hour hydration. Contains soothing seaweed.
HIGH QUALITY PRODUCT - Made in Spain. Vegan and cruelty free.
description: Product Description About the Product Meet our most gentle hair removal cream—designed specifically for the male intimate area, including your pubic region, groin, scrotum, and buttocks. Say goodbye to shaving hassles and hello to smooth, cut-free skin! This cream isn’t just about removing hair; it’s about a better grooming experience. Our formula provides long-lasting results with less itchy regrowth and fewer ingrown hairs compared to shaving, so you can enjoy smooth skin that actually feels good. Plus, our dermatologically tested formula includes soothing urea, algae, and seaweed, leaving your skin feeling calm and hydrated. Wondering if it's safe to use on sensitive areas? We get it—it’s an intimate area, and you want to be careful. But with over a million units sold and 10,000+ five-star reviews, you’re in safe hands. Our cream is trusted by men worldwide for delivering a smooth, painless solution to intimate grooming. So go ahead, skip the razor cuts, and experience grooming that’s comfortable, effective, and designed just for you. 3 easy steps Simple application at home 1 . Use the spatula to apply a thick layer of cream, covering the hair completely. Do not rub in. 2 . Leave the cream on for 4 minutes. Test with the spatula on a small area to see if the hair comes away easily. If not, leave the cream on for a little longer and test again. Never exceed 8 minutes in total. 3 . When the hair comes away, remove the cream and hair with the spatula. Rinse with plenty of water The NO HAIR CREW Product Range Intimate Hair Removal Cr. product_details_tab_data.Title: NO HAIR CREW Intimate Hair Removal Cream for Men – Extra Gentle, Fast & Painless Depilation for Groin, Scrotum, Buttocks & Pubic Area – 100 ml
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Health & Personal Care › Shaving & Hair Removal › Hair Removal › Depilatories
product_details_tab_data.Recommended Uses: Body hair removal for men, suitable for groin, balls, buttocks.
product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Hair-free smooth skin, no risk of cuts, easy to use
product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: Water (Aqua), Urea, Cetearyl Alcohol, Isopropyl Myristate, Potassium Thioglycolate, Calcium Hydroxide, Ceteareth-20, Propylene Glycol, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Panax Ginseng Root Extract, Spirulina Maxima Extract, Laminaria Digitata Extract, Fucus Vesiculosus Extract, Ascophyllum Nodosum Extract, Porphyra Umbilicalis Extract, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Potassium Hydroxide, Acrylates Copolymer, Glycerin, Gluconolactone, Calcium Gluconate, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Fragrance (Parfum).
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Follow the instructions. Before each use, test your skin reaction by applying the cream to a small part of the area you wish to treat, following the instructions. If after 24 hours there is no adverse reaction, begin using. If you feel a tingling or burning sensation, remove the product immediately and rinse with plenty of water. If symptoms persist, seek medical advice. This product is suitable for the groin, buttocks and scrotum. Do not use on the head, face, nipples or surrounding area, perianal area, mucous skin or any other part of the body. Do not apply on wounds, spots, cracked, irritated or burnt skin or skin which has previously had an adverse reaction to a hair removal cream. Avoid sun bathing, swimming, using deodorants or other alcohol-based or perfumed products for 24 hours before and after the hair removal. Always wait 72 hours between applications. Contains thio glycolate. Contains alkali. Keep out of reach of children. Do not ingest. If swallowed, seek immediate medical attention and show this packaging. Avoid contact with eyes. Rinse eyes immediately if product comes into contact with them.
